get.description:
Returns all website content settings in one endpoint: hero section,
about section, contact information, and social media links.

Returns a paginated list of events. Filter by type: archive, happening, future.
Each event includes name (multilang), description, date, time, location,
speakers, about_event, what_to_expect, gallery pictures, and status.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by event type: archive, happening, future. Omit for all.

get.description:
Retrieves full details of a specific event including all multilang fields,
gallery pictures, and current status.

Returns a paginated list of all active medical services available in the system.
Each service includes pricing, duration, and availability status.

Retrieves detailed information about a specific service including description,
pricing, duration, and list of doctors who provide this service.

Returns a paginated list of trainings with name (multilang), description,
price, trainer info, main image, gallery images, average rating and review count.

Retrieves full details of a specific training including all multilang fields,
media, approved reviews, and video URL.

post.description:
Submits a new review for the given training. The review is pending admin approval
before it appears publicly. Requires authentication.
post.summary: Submit a review for a training (auth required)

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of all published testimonials from patients.
Each testimonial includes patient name, rating, review content, and timestamp.
get.summary: List all published testimonials with pagination

get.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific testimonial including patient name,
rating (1-5 stars), full review content, and associated patient information.

post.description:
Creates a new patient account and generates access and refresh tokens for authentication.
The patient can then use these tokens for subsequent API requests.

image.description: Optional profile image (jpeg, png, jpg, max 2MB)
image.example: use form-data to upload a file

post.description:
Authenticates a patient with email and password credentials.
Returns access and refresh tokens for authenticated API requests.

Invalidates all authentication tokens for the current patient.
The patient will need to login again to access protected endpoints.

Generates a new access token using the refresh token.
Use this endpoint when the access token expires to obtain a new one without re-logging in.
Verify a patient's email address using the token sent to their email.
Resend the email verification link to the authenticated patient.

get.description:
Retrieves the complete profile information of the currently authenticated patient.
Returns all patient details including personal information and contact details.

post.description:
Updates the personal information of the authenticated patient.
Allows modification of name, phone, email, and other profile details.

image.description: Patient profile image (jpeg, png, jpg, max 2MB)

post.description:
Changes the patient's password and generates a new access token for security.
The old password must be provided for verification before the change is applied.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the authenticated patient's appointments with optional filters.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, confirmed, rejected, cancelled, completed)

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific appointment belonging to the authenticated patient.

post.description: Submit a cancellation request for an appointment. Admin must approve.

reason.example: I am traveling and cannot make the appointment

post.description: Submit a reschedule request for an appointment. Admin must approve.

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of all active doctors in the system.
Each doctor includes basic information and count of services they provide.

Returns a paginated list of all active medical services available in the system.
Each service includes pricing, duration, and availability status.

Retrieves detailed information about a specific doctor including their profile
and the complete list of services they provide with pricing and duration.
get.summary: Get doctor details with their services

get.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific service including description,
pricing, duration, and list of doctors who provide this service.

Retrieves the next available appointment slot for a doctor offering a specific service.
Takes into account the doctor's availability schedule (days of week and hours) and existing appointments.
Returns the first available slot within the next 30 days.

Returns paginated list of the authenticated patient's notifications.
Title and body are returned with all three translations (en/ar/fr).
Returns the count of unread notifications for the authenticated patient.

post.description: Marks all notifications for the authenticated patient as read.
Marks a specific notification as read.

delete.description: Deletes a specific notification for the authenticated patient.

post.description:
Takes a date and start time, checks if the doctor has an available slot for the service duration at that time.
Respects doctor's availability schedule (days of week and hours).
post.summary: Check if a specific time slot is available for booking

date.description: Date for the appointment in d-m-Y format

start_time.description: Start time for the appointment in H:i format (24-hour)

enum: Requested slot is not available or already booked
Requested time is outside doctor's availability window
Doctor is not available on this day of the week

post.description:
Creates an appointment for the authenticated patient with the specified doctor and service.
The time slot must be available and within the doctor's availability schedule.
Also creates a block in Zap to prevent double-booking.

date.description: Date for the appointment in d-m-Y format

start_time.description: Start time for the appointment in H:i format (24-hour)

post.summary: Submit an urgent booking (no auth required)

get.summary: List the authenticated patient's urgent bookings
Show a single urgent booking (must belong to authenticated patient)

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
